calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT
Off Calendar Apr-29-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Jonas for Thomas Enright.

Mr. Jonas stated that the request to modify the Trust was to create a safety net for Kelly and Jesse due to their lack of employment and that the fees were based on the terms of the trust. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Svahlin.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT
Off Calendar Mar-30-2009 Continued To Apr-13-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel, or interested person.

The matter was continued to April 13, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for counsel to appear.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
